# remnawave_subpage_config (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave subscription page config.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the subscription page config (2-30 chars, letters/numbers/underscores/dashes/spaces).

### Optional

- `config` (String) Subscription page config as a JSON string. Opaque to the provider — the panel manages the structure.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) UUID of the subscription page config.
